steps.title: Surgewave Streams
steps.text: Surgewave Streams is a powerful stream processing library inspired by Kafka Streams. It enables real-time data transformation, aggregation, and joins directly within your .NET application.

steps.title: Stream Topologies
steps.text: Streams are defined as topologies: directed graphs of processing nodes. Each node transforms, filters, or aggregates records flowing through the pipeline.

steps.title: Processing Operations
steps.text: Surgewave Streams supports map, filter, flatMap, groupByKey, aggregate, windowed joins (tumbling, hopping, sliding, session), and stateful processing with built-in state stores.

steps.title: High Performance
steps.text: Surgewave Streams uses System.Threading.Channels for multi-threaded processing with pluggable partition assignment strategies (RoundRobin, Sticky) for optimal throughput.
